falsification_conditions.condition: The price of the asset rises above the 200-day moving average by 15% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would contradict the 'bottom' pattern and invalidate the HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant escalation in blowoff metrics would indicate a phase shift inconsistent with the current UNKNOWN verdict

falsification_conditions.condition: The VIX volatility index drops below 18 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained low volatility would refute the implied market stress required for the bottom_2024_aug pattern

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
